meaning: adv.蟒ｶ霑溷慍,騾礼蕗荳榊悉蝨ｰ
examples: He seemed reluctant to put away the picture, held it for another minute, lingeringly, before my eyes.
She went on peeling the lords and ladies till Clare, regarding for a moment the wave-like curl of her lashes as they drooped with her bent gaze on her soft cheek, lingeringly went away.
Some conservative commentators, who didn窶冲 have much else to gloat about, dwelt lingeringly on what they evidently regarded as the upside of the huge, Obama-sparked African-American turnout.
When we were introduced, he shook my hand, and held on to it lingeringly, I thought.
